default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Default's inbound automation solution for GrowthX.ai's lead qualification and routing needs.](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Default offers an all-in-one solution for inbound lead qualification, routing, and scheduling with built-in enrichment from Clearbit and Apollo](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai needs a solution compatible with Adio CRM; Default supports this while competitor Chili Piper does not](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Pricing: $6,000/year platform fee + $540/year per seat; GrowthX.ai considering 3 seats (\~$7,620/year)](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
  - [Key technical question: Can Default's webhook functionality integrate with GrowthX.ai's custom qualification logic and SEMrush data?](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)

## Topics

### Company Backgrounds

  - [Default: Seed stage, raising Series A, 200 customers, 19 employees (mostly engineers), $1.3M ARR](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai: New AI-powered content marketing agency, $7M ARR in 10 months, struggling with high customer demand](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)

### Default's Product Overview

  - [All-in-one solution: Form builder, enrichment, qualification, routing, scheduling, CRM integration](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [Built-in enrichment from Clearbit and Apollo at no extra cost](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Flexible workflow builder with if-else logic, API integrations](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [Branded scheduling pages, team availability management](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [CRM creation/updates, Slack notifications, email reminders](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)

### Technical Capabilities

  - [Form builder: Multi-page, conditional logic, dynamic fields, UTM tracking](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)
  - [Qualification: Based on form data, enrichment data, or CRM fields](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
  - [Routing: Round-robin, based on availability or fairness](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [Webhook functionality for custom integrations (e.g., SEMrush)](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [AI prompts within workflows for advanced logic](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)

### Pricing and Contract

  - [Platform fee: $6,000/year](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
  - [Per seat (routing + scheduling): $540/year](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [20,000 enrichment credits/year included (\~1,600/month)](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
  - [Annual commitment required, no trials or POCs](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)
  - [Flexible billing options available](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)

### Implementation and Support

  - [3-week implementation period with dedicated support](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
  - [Ongoing support via shared Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
  - [Custom workflow and form building assistance](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=1790.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to detail webhook/API integration requirements in Default's Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
  - [Default engineer (Jonathan) to review and confirm technical feasibility](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=2035.0)
  - [If approved, Jason to seek internal budget approval (\~$7,620/year)](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=2050.0)
  - [Upon approval, review MSA, sign order form, schedule onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=2314.0)
  - [Build and test workflow/form before launching on GrowthX.ai website](https://fathom.video/share/hnt1drBAAQXusk9EztSUPYz3Q6Aob5Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=2335.0)

action_items.description: Draft detailed msg re webhook reqs (SEMrush integration, agent stuff) in Default Slack channel
Ping leadership team re $7k/yr Default purchase; mention alternatives (e.g. Chili Piper)
Huddle w/ Jonathan; give TLDR on Jason's webhook reqs before he msgs in Slack
